channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Africa CDC acknowledges India’s emergency medical assistance amid Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: The Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) has expressed gratitude to India for providing urgent medical assistance to support efforts against the ongoing Ebola outbreak in the...

item.title: IFAB approves rule changes for 2026 World Cup addressing conduct, time-wasting, and VAR updates
item.description: The International Football Association Board (IFAB) has approved a series of significant rule changes that will take effect starting with the 2026–27 football season and will also be implemented at th...

item.title: Keir Starmer outlines housing reform agenda focused on expanding social housing and tackling shortages
item.description: In this opinion piece, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer sets out his vision for addressing the housing crisis through what he describes as a “politics of home”. He reflects on the importance of stable h...

item.title: Former Canadian Forces major urges Ottawa to honour Afghan resettlement promise for at-risk interpreter
item.description: A retired Canadian Forces major is urging the federal government to honour its commitments to Afghan nationals who supported Canadian and NATO missions, highlighting the case of an Afghan man currentl...

item.title: Investigation finds congressional press credential system granted access to ineligible individuals, including convicted offender and political operatives
item.description: A Raw Story investigation reports serious irregularities in how congressional press credentials are issued by the Radio-Television Correspondents’ Association (RTCA), a powerful but little-known body ...

item.title: Canada Post workers await decision on proposed tentative labour agreement
item.description: Canada Post workers are expected to learn whether a new tentative labour agreement has been reached, according to reporting from The Canadian Press published on June 1, 2026. The development comes ami...

item.title: Former First Minister Urges Joint Inquiry into Peter Murrell's Embezzlement
item.description: Former Labour First Minister Jack McConnell has called for a joint inquiry by the UK and Scottish parliaments into financial crimes committed by Peter Murrell, ex-SNP chief executive and estranged hus...

item.title: Mbalula rejects Maimane’s proposal to chair parliamentary committee probing Ramaphosa impeachment process
item.description: ANC secretary-general Fikile Mbalula has firmly rejected the idea of Build One South Africa (BOSA) leader Mmusi Maimane chairing Parliament’s impeachment committee that will investigate allegations li...

item.title: Second batch of documents on Peter Mandelson appointment to be published, including ministerial messages
item.description: The UK Government is preparing to publish a second and substantial tranche of documents relating to the appointment of Labour peer Lord Peter Mandelson as US ambassador, following a parliamentary dema...

item.title: Trump Advisor's Brief Social Media Post Sparks QAnon Speculation
item.description: Dan Scavino, senior advisor to former President Donald Trump, posted a brief five-word message on social media that quickly caught the attention of QAnon followers. The post, 'Every journey has an end...

item.title: South Africa warned against rising vigilantism amid immigration and social tensions
item.description: The opinion piece examines growing social tensions in South Africa, particularly linked to illegal immigration, unemployment, crime, and failing service delivery. It highlights how frustration in vari...

item.title: Studies Link Adult Thymus Health to Longevity, Disease Risk, and Cancer Immunotherapy Outcomes
item.description: Researchers at Mass General Brigham have reported evidence that the thymus, an immune-system organ located in the chest, may remain important throughout adulthood despite decades of assumptions that i...

item.title: Former DPWH Secretary Manuel Bonoan placed under custody and hospital care after surrendering over Sandiganbayan warrant
item.description: Former Department of Public Works and Highways (DPWH) Secretary Manuel Bonoan was taken to the Philippine National Police (PNP) General Hospital after voluntarily surrendering to authorities on Monday...

item.title: Hudson Williams celebrates record-breaking Canadian Screen Awards success for Heated Rivalry
item.description: Actor Hudson Williams expressed appreciation and excitement after the production Heated Rivalry achieved a historic milestone at the Canadian Screen Awards. According to the report, the project set a ...

item.title: Tanzania U-17 talent Dismas Athanasi shines as team reaches historic AFCON final against Senegal
item.description: Dismas Shida Athanasi, only 14 years old, has become one of the biggest highlights of the TotalEnergies CAF Under-17 Africa Cup of Nations held in Morocco 2026. He is the youngest player in the tourna...

item.title: EU Reaffirms Pakistan as Key Regional Partner During High-Level Strategic Dialogue in Islamabad
item.description: The European Union’s top foreign policy chief, Kaja Kallas, has described Pakistan as a major regional power and an important partner of the EU during the 8th EU-Pakistan Strategic Dialogue held in Is...

item.title: Laurie Daley focuses on State of Origin II despite contract uncertainty
item.description: NSW Blues coach Laurie Daley has steered clear of discussing his future ahead of State of Origin II, keeping the focus firmly on preparing his team for a potential series-clinching match. Following a ...

item.title: Tanzania Approves Key Frameworks to Launch Vision 2050
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania is officially ready to start implementing Vision 2050 from July 1st, 2026. The National Planning Commission, chaired by President Samia Suluhu Hassan, has approved four major ...

item.title: Brisbane property prices continue rising as market momentum slows amid supply shortages and affordability pressures
item.description: Brisbane’s housing market continued to record price growth in May 2026, even as signs emerged that buyer activity is beginning to slow. According to property research firm Cotality, the city’s median ...

item.title: African countries and partners mobilise nearly $500 million to contain major Ebola outbreak and strengthen regional health security
item.description: African governments, together with international partners, have pledged almost $500 million in funding to respond to a rapidly expanding Ebola outbreak caused by the Bundibugyo strain. According to th...
